meaning: Pompous, overblown in style — NOT boring
mnemonic: Tu itna ghumaa-phiraake bol raha hai, dimaag turgid ho gaya. A turgid river is swollen with water — turgid writing is swollen with unnecessary words.
Im + peccable (Latin peccare = to sin) → literally "un-sin-nable." Nothing to peck/pick at.

meaning: Subdued or humbled, especially after criticism
mnemonic: Itni daant padi ki bilkul chup-chaap, sharminda ho gaya. Chasten = daant kar seedha karna.
Diplomat jaisi baat karta hai — seedha jawaab nahi deta. Tactfully vague, not just "polite."
Candid camera mein jo dikhta hai woh real hota hai, bina filter ke. Seedha-saadha sach.
Com-PREHEND-sive — to comprehend fully, you need everything. Sab kuch cover, chhoti se chhoti cheez bhi.
Seedhe rasta se hatke, side se nikal gaya — avoided facing it head-on.

meaning: Formal accusation; a charge of wrongdoing
mnemonic: Indictment = ilzaam, jaise court mein FIR jaisa charge. Silent "c" — sounds like "in-DITE-ment."

Profligate spender 
Example: paisa pani ki tarah bahata hai (Spends money like water)
